use_cases: Triggering primary actions in forms and applications
Submitting form data with styled call-to-action buttons
Navigating between pages or sections with styled link buttons
Providing destructive action options like delete or cancel operations
Creating icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple visual variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, class-variance-authority for variant management, and Tailwind CSS for consistent styling. Supports multiple sizes and includes accessibility features like focus states and disabled state handling.
